# rust_robotics_nearest_neighbor

KD-tree based nearest neighbor search used by RustRobotics SLAM algorithms.

```toml
[dependencies]
rust_robotics_nearest_neighbor = "0.1"
```

The crate exposes `KdTree` over fixed-size `nalgebra::SVector` points.

Project site: https://rsasaki0109.github.io/rust_robotics/

Repository: https://github.com/rsasaki0109/rust_robotics
